name: BaseMultiInput
description:
Defines specific behavior for Input controls which deals with list of values including:
 - Select
 - RadioGroup
 - CheckboxGroup
 - ComboBox
 ...

inputs.name: autoComplete
inputs.description: Whether the autocomplete should be enabled; Enabled by default

inputs.name: avatarsrc
inputs.description: The field to show avatar image data in secondary column

inputs.name: buttonFocusable
inputs.description: Whether AddOn Button should be focusable

inputs.name: description
inputs.description: The field to show data in secondary column

inputs.name: entityClass
inputs.description:
Todo: Name of the entity for which DataProvider will be loaded. You can either pass list of
items or use this entityClass and internally we should be able to do lookup to some registry
and retrieve the best matching DataProvider that is set on application level

inputs.name: group
inputs.description: Tells the multi input if we need to group items

inputs.name: groupKey
inputs.description: A field name to use to group data by (support dotted notation)

inputs.name: maxHeight
inputs.description: Provides maximum height for the optionPanel

inputs.name: mobile
inputs.description: Whether the Multi Input should be built on mobile mode

inputs.name: mobileConfig
inputs.description: Multi Input Mobile Configuration, it's applied only, when mobile is enabled

inputs.name: openDropdownOnAddOnClicked
inputs.description: Whether to open the dropdown when the addon button is clicked.

inputs.name: secondaryTextAlignment
inputs.description: Horizontally align text inside the second column (Applicable for two columns layout)

inputs.name: showSecondaryText
inputs.description: Show the second column (Applicable for two columns layout)

outputs.name: addOnButtonClicked
outputs.description: Emits event when the addon button is clicked.

outputs.name: onDataReceived
outputs.description: Event emitted when data loading is finished.

outputs.name: onDataRequested
outputs.description: Event emitted when data loading is started.

outputs.name: searchTermChange
outputs.description: Event emitted when the search term changes. Use *$event* to access the new term.

methods.name: focus
methods.description:
In most of the cases when working with input element directly you should be just find to assing
variable to this element

```
<input #inputElementRef fd-form-control ...>
```

and this default behavior used. For other cases implement focus.

methods.name: onContainerClick
methods.description:
Handles even when we click on parent container which is the FormField Wrapping this
control
